# zabbix_template (Resource)

Manages a Zabbix template.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "zabbix_template_group" "linux_templates" {
  name = "Linux templates"
}

resource "zabbix_template" "linux_base" {
  host        = "Linux base"
  name        = "Linux base template"
  description = "Base monitoring for Linux hosts"

  template_group_ids = [zabbix_template_group.linux_templates.id]

  macros = {
    "{$AGENT.PORT}"  = "10050"
    "{$AGENT.TIMEOUT}" = "3"
  }
}

resource "zabbix_template" "linux_extended" {
  host = "Linux extended"

  template_group_ids  = [zabbix_template_group.linux_templates.id]
  linked_template_ids = [zabbix_template.linux_base.id]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host` (String) Technical name of the template. Must be unique within Zabbix.
- `template_group_ids` (Set of String) Set of template group IDs the template belongs to. At least one is required. This set is authoritative — any groups not listed here are removed on apply.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the template.
- `macros` (Map of String) Map of user macro names to values. Macro names must use the `{$NAME}` format. This map is authoritative — any macros not listed here are removed on apply.
- `name` (String) Visible display name of the template. Defaults to the technical name if not set.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the template.
